Code fragment: public final TableField<RolesRecord, Integer> ID = createField(DSL.name("id"), SQLDataType.INTEGER.nullable(false).identity(true), this, "");
Explanation: The 'roles' table uses a synthetic auto-increment 'id' column as primary key, but already has a unique constraint on 'name' (ROLES_NAME_KEY) which is a natural key suitable for identifying roles.
